meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell. Master user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-value, repeatable SaaS features for your clients.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start shipping. By implementing modular user onboarding with Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform abstract concepts into production-ready features. This workflow allows you to build, test, and iterate on onboarding flows in minutes, ensuring your clients receive professional, revenue-driving solutions immediately.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and for the tenth time this week, you are stuck in a cycle of endless syntax tutorials. You have the knowledge, but you lack the velocity to turn that knowledge into a paycheck. The gap between 'learning to code' and 'shipping a product' is a chasm that swallows most freelancers whole.

But what if you stopped watching and started architecting? By leveraging professional-grade AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can bypass the boilerplate and focus on the business logic that clients actually pay for. This isn't just about writing code; it’s about building an automated, high-converting onboarding experience that proves your value as an engineer.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Before writing code, map the critical path. Identify the 'Aha!' moment where the user realizes the value of the app. This prevents scope creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Lead SaaS Architect. Design a 4-step user onboarding flow that guides a new user from sign-up to their first 'Aha!' moment. Output the logic as a JSON schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a JSON schema for a 4-step onboarding flow based on the user journey map generated by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Generate Modular UI Components
steps.description: Use AI to scaffold consistent, reusable UI components for your onboarding modals to ensure design system alignment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate React/Tailwind code for a modular onboarding modal component that accepts dynamic step content and progress indicators.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file src/components/OnboardingModal.tsx --prompt 'Implement the React/Tailwind onboarding modal component from Antigravity.'

steps.title: Implement State Management
steps.description: Handle the onboarding state so users don't see the same prompts twice. Persistence is key to a professional experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React hook using Zustand to manage onboarding progress and ensure the modal only triggers if the user has not completed the steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts --prompt 'Generate a Zustand store and hook to track and persist user onboarding status.'

steps.title: Integrate Event Tracking
steps.description: Track onboarding completion rates to provide clients with data-backed proof of your work's effectiveness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer function to track onboarding step completion events using a generic analytics interface.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file src/services/analytics.ts --prompt 'Add an analytics tracking service for onboarding milestones using the patterns provided.'

steps.title: Automated Integration Testing
steps.description: Verify the flow works across different device sizes and user states before handing it off to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Playwright test script that simulates a user completing the onboarding flow and verifies the final state transition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Execute the Playwright test suite for the new onboarding feature and fix any identified regressions.'

pro_tips: Always build onboarding as a decoupled feature; clients will eventually ask to change the order of steps.
Use 'ghost' states in your UI to show users what they are missing, increasing feature adoption.
Never hardcode onboarding text; pull it from a JSON file or CMS so clients can edit it without you.
Track the drop-off rate at each step of your onboarding to identify UI friction points instantly.
Leverage Claude Code's `--review` flag to have the AI audit its own code for potential security vulnerabilities before deployment.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment and present the analytics data to your client to demonstrate clear ROI.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for yourself and start building for your business. Leverage these tools to shorten your dev cycles and increase your hourly rate. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
